q: Find the arithmetic mean of 96, 70, 85, 52, 40, 88, 63, 40 and 60.
1/20 is what percentage of 11/50? (Round off the answer to two decimal places.)
Two typists can complete a typing task in 40 minutes by working together. How much time will it take for one of them alone to complete the typing of 101 such tasks (in minutes)?
A trader marks the price of his goods 75% above the cost price and gives a 52% discount on it. Find the loss percentage in this transaction.
The average score of 10 players in a cricket match is 57 runs. If the eleventh player scores 195 runs, then by what percentage will their (the players') average score increase?
Simplify (5x + 11y)^2 + (5x - 11y)^2.
The present ages of two brothers differ by 4 years. Twenty years ago, the elder brother's age was 1.25 times the younger brother's age. What is the present age of the younger brother (in years)?
A person stands at a distance of 36 metres from the foot of a tower. The angle of elevation of the top of the tower is theta, and tan(theta) = 5/3. What is the height of the tower (in metres)?
In an election between two candidates, 80% of the voters cast their votes, and one of them got 8,820 votes, which were 75% of the total votes cast. Find the total number of registered voters.

11 men and 17 women can complete a piece of work in 6 days, while 18 men and 15 women can complete the same work in 4 days. In how many days can the work of 1 woman be done by 1 man? (i.e., the work of how many women equals the work of 1 man?)
A and B can do a piece of work in 6 days. A alone can do the same work in 7 days. In how many days can B alone do twice that work (in days)?
What is the cube root of 18, 8 and 8a?
The base of a triangle is 39 cm, 62 cm and 85 cm. If the side measuring 62 cm is taken as the base, find the corresponding height of the triangle.
A trader gives a discount of 32% on the marked price and even after that earns a profit of 57%. Find the ratio of the cost price to the marked price.
Ravi sells only pens and pencils. The price of one pen is Rs.12 and the price of one pencil is Rs.4. A student buys a total of 25 items and spends Rs.180. How many pens did the student buy?
A block of dimensions 24 cm x 16 cm x 10 cm is to be cut into small cubes each with an edge of 4 cm. Find the maximum number of such cubes that can be made.
A train 1768 m long crosses a pole in 68 seconds. How much time will the same train take to cross a 338 m long platform (in seconds)?
Two typists can complete a typing task in 40 minutes by working together. How much time will it take to complete the typing of 112 such tasks (in minutes)?
The total number of coloured balls is 6469. If the ratio of red balls to green balls is 7 : 5 and the ratio of green balls to blue balls is 8 : 4, then how many blue balls are there?

Two brothers A and B respectively deposit Rs.20,000 each for a fixed period in two different banks at simple interest rates of 4.5% and 7.5% per annum. Find the difference between the interest amounts received by them (in Rs.).
Raman's income is Rs.68,800. He spends 18.5% of his income. If his income increases by 17% and his expenditure increases by 25%, then his savings will __________.

Two trains 210 m and 390 m long are running in the same direction at speeds of 120 km/h and 150 km/h respectively. How much time will the faster train take to completely overtake (pass) the slower train (in seconds)?
A box of sweets is bought for Rs.27,650 and sold at a profit of 5%. Find the profit (in Rs.). (Round off the answer to the nearest rupee.)

A field is in the shape of a quadrilateral with a perimeter of 240 m and one side measuring 180 m. A rope is laid along the boundary which is to be covered with grass; for this, the grass is laid 25 cm wide on the entire boundary. If the deep depth/spread is calculated, find the height (in m). (approx.)
If 'x' and '+' are interchanged with each other and '+' and 'x' are interchanged with each other, then what will be the value of the following equation? 26 x 2 = 8 + 4 + 9 = ?

Reena, starting from her home, walks 6 km towards East and then walks 11 km towards North. After that she walks 6 km towards East and then she walks 4 km towards North to reach a temple. After offering prayers she walks 2 km towards West to reach a friend's house. What is the shortest distance (in km) from the temple to the friend's house?

In a certain code language, P # Q means 'P is the mother of Q'; P @ Q means 'P is the father of Q'; P & Q means 'P is the sister of Q'; and P % Q means 'P is the brother of Q'. Based on the above code, how is V related to S in the expression P & Q @ R # S % U % V?
Which of the following groups of letters, when sequentially placed in the blanks, will complete the given letter series? IHT KJS MLR ON_
Which number will replace the question mark (?) in the given series? 97 80 63 46 29 ?

Mohan starts from point A and walks 11 km towards North, then turns right and walks 19 km, then turns right and walks 24 km, then turns right again and walks 19 km, and finally turns right and walks 11 km. Now in which direction and how far is Mohan from point A?

In a certain code language, certain words are coded based on a given letter-symbol scheme as follows: (key) 1 2 9 6 & 5 £ & $ E 5 1 * * # * 6 % 6 0 7 (lock). According to this code, how will the given word be coded?

Answer the following questions based on the given number and symbol series, and given that the counting is to be done from the left end only. (key) 1 0 % £ 8 8 @ % 4 # 1 0 3 7 6 3 % * & 4 9 7 (lock). In this series, how many such symbols are there, each of which is immediately preceded by a number and immediately followed by a number?
HR is related to KU in a certain way. In the same way, SK is related to VN. Following the same logic, EW is related to which of the following?
Considering the alphabet in normal order, which group of letters should come in place of the question mark (?) to complete the given series? UDB VEC WFD XGE ?
In a certain code language, 'lab bird set' is coded as 'ef xo oj' and 'set web hall' is coded as 'ot ef fns'. In that language, how will the word 'set' be coded?
If 'A' means '+', '-' means 'x', 'C' means '-' and 'D' means '/', then what will come in place of the question mark (?) in the following equation? 36 B 8 C 528 A 22 D 55 = ?
What will come in place of the question mark (?) in the given series? 532 542 550 556 560 ?
Following a certain logic, the letters within each group form a series. Identify which of the given options follows the same pattern as the given groups. OWES - WOES - OESW
What should come in place of the question mark (?) to logically complete the given series? 5 10 10 20 20 40 40 ?
In a certain code language, 'keep turning pages' is coded as 'kd vt tg' and 'count the pages' is coded as 'ks vt zd'. In that language, how is the word 'pages' coded?
PI 13 is related to SM 17 in a certain way. In the same way, HA 24 is related to KE 28. Following the same logic, RK 35 is related to which of the following?
In a class, Anjali's rank is 17th from the top and 28th from the bottom. How many students are there in the class?
